office_does: The county clerk maintains Superior Court records, processes filings, and supports court administration and public access.
race_blurb: Four candidates with legal, court, administrative, management, and community-service backgrounds are seeking the clerk's office.

candidates.summary: Sewell has legal and community-service experience and emphasizes court access, processing, training, communication, and records.
highlights: Emphasizes accessible justice, training, communication, and records [S1].

experience.basis: She has related legal experience but no documented clerk-office tenure.

candidates.summary: Butler has legal-system, management, and community experience and emphasizes court access, procedures, staff development, and secure records.
highlights: Emphasizes court access, staff development, and secure records [S1].

experience.basis: She has related legal-system and management experience but no documented clerk-office tenure.

candidates.summary: Hazelo has organizational and public-service experience and emphasizes responsive service, records accuracy, employee support, and modernization.
highlights: Has professional, organizational, and public-service experience [S1].
Emphasizes records accuracy, employee support, and modernization [S1].

experience.basis: She has organizational and public-service experience but no documented clerk-office tenure.

candidates.summary: Adams has court, legal-support, and administrative experience and emphasizes records, technology, service, and case processing.
highlights: Has court, legal-support, and administrative experience [S1].
Emphasizes records, technology, service, and case processing [S1].

experience.basis: Her directly related court and legal-support experience places her between a proven clerk-office record and an outsider profile.
